package rulecoverage

func NegativeHandlerOpensTransaction() string {
    ruleID := "handler_opens_transaction"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that call `Begin`, `Transaction`, or unit-of-work start helpers directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
